title: Native OperationSpec dispatcher core
tests: pytest tests/unit/test_m08b_dispatcher_table.py = 6 passed (table<->handler parity drift guard)
pytest tests/unit = 259 passed, 0 failed (253 pre-existing + 6 new; no regression)
runtime_smoke_finding: Attempted via worktree router + tracked tests/fixtures/native_sample.dwg. The router selects engine BY OP and routes catalogued ops (incl. native-family: compute.brep.massprops, extend.customobject.define) to the MANAGED CadJobRunner (engine=managed_objectarx_active_document, returns 'Unsupported CAD job operation') -- NOT to the native .crx. So this ticket's native OPERATION_NOT_IMPLEMENTED is a native-module-internal contract that fires only on a DIRECT ARIADNE_NATIVE_JOB invocation (router does that only for inspect.database.graph + P1 writes).

deferred.item: direct-ARIADNE_NATIVE_JOB negative-path smoke (load worktree .crx in accoreconsole, feed a catalogued op, assert error_code=OPERATION_NOT_IMPLEMENTED + engine=native_objectarx)
deferred.reason: router per-op routing sends catalogued ops to the managed plane, so it cannot reach the native gate; the negative path requires a direct ARIADNE_NATIVE_JOB harness (attended/MERGE-gate). Former blocker 'worktree has no DWG' is now REMOVED: tests/fixtures/native_sample.dwg (AC1032) is tracked so any worktree can stage it.
deferred.mitigation: native gate is compile-verified (build exit 0; .crx grew) + source-contract-verified (parity + gate present in ariadneNativeJob); deterministic 3-line gate proven in the built binary; 39 handler bodies byte-identical (259 tests pass). Run the direct-native smoke in MERGE-M08-READ.

hard_constraints: no acedCommand/acedCmd introduced; no sealed-virtual overrides; additive C++ only; no original DWG write; no secrets
next: M08B-T02 (generic serializers + UTF-8 writer); then M08C-F READ family + M08O FALLBACK extend the table
